auth.accountNotVerified: Account not verified. Check your E-mail for verification or navigate to /verify-account to resend
auth.noUserFound: No user found with the entered username/e-mail

userAchievements.invalidAchievementClass: Invalid achievement class. Nothing found in config.
userAchievements.invalidAchievementId: Invalid achievement ID. Nothing found in config.
userAchievements.invalidAchievementTier: Invalid achievement tier. Nothing found in config.

userConnections.noUserFound: No user found with the provided criteria
userConnections.noRequestSelf: Cannot make a user connection with self
userConnections.locationRequired: User location is required for this endpoint

metrics.mustBeOwner: Must be content owner to view metrics

notifications.achievementCompleted: You completed an achievement! Go claim your reward to collect coins.
notifications.connectionRequestReceived: You have received a new connection request from {firstName} {lastName}
notifications.newDmReceived: New direct message from {userName} while you were away
notifications.newGroupInvite: {inviterUserName} invited you to join the group, {groupName}
notifications.discoveredUniqueMoment: Check the map to activate a moment with special attributes
notifications.discoveredUniqueSpace: Check the map to activate a space with special attributes

invites.phone: {name} has invited you to join Therr app. Sign up with this link to connect https://therr.com

thoughtReactions.thoughtNotActivated: This user is not permitted to access content without first activating the thought

validation: The required parameters were not provided.

verification.subject: [Account Verification] {brandShortName} User Account
verification.body1: Your new user account was successfully created. Click the following link to verify your account.
verification.postBody1: If you are unable to click the link, copy paste the following URL in the browser: {linkUrl}

oneTimePassword.subject: [Forgot Password?] {brandShortName} One-Time Password
oneTimePassword.body1: Looks like you forgot your password and requested a reset. Use this temporary password to access your account. After login, you can reset your password from the user settings page.

passwordChange.subject: [Password Changed] {brandShortName} Account Settings
passwordChange.body1: Your password has been successfully updated. If you initiated this change, please disregard this e-mail.
passwordChange.body2: If you did not initiate this change, please contact us immediately to resolve the issue.

ssoNewUser.subject: [Account Created] {brandShortName} One-Time Password
ssoNewUser.body1: A new user account was successfully created. Click the following link to login, choose a username, and set your password. You can login with SSO or directly with your account password.
ssoNewUser.postBody1: If you are unable to click the link, copy paste the following URL in the browser: {linkUrl}

subscriberVerification.body1: You were successfully subscribed to our general updates channel. We'll only send updates for big events to keep you in the loop. If don't have the app yet, get the early release on Google Play or the Apple App Store.

pendingInvite.body1: You have a new friend request from {fromName} on {brandName}.

newGroupInvite.body1: {fromUserName} invited you to join the group, {groupName}
newGroupInvite.body2: Joining a group grants access to group chat and upcoming events. Login to check your notifications and reply to the invite.
newGroupInvite.postBody1: If you are unable to click the link, copy paste the following URL in the browser: {linkUrl}

newGroupMembers.body2WithMembers: New members ({membersList}) recently joined your group, {groupName}. Login and review their requests if approval is required to join the group.
newGroupMembers.body2WithoutMembers: New members recently joined your group, {groupName}. Login and review their requests if approval is required to join the group.
newGroupMembers.postBody1: If you are unable to click the link, copy paste the following URL in the browser: {linkUrl}

contactInvite.body1: {fromName} has invited you to connect on Therr app. You can e-mail them directly at {fromEmail}
contactInvite.body2: Follow the link below to sign up today.
contactInvite.postBody1: If you are unable to click the link, copy paste the following URL in the browser: {linkUrl}

newUserInvite.body1: You have been invited to connect with {fromName} on Therr app. You can e-mail them directly at {fromEmail}
newUserInvite.body2: Follow the link below to finish creating your profile, and use this one-time password:
newUserInvite.postBody1: If you are unable to click the link, copy paste the following URL in the browser: {linkUrl}

coinsReceived.body1: You just claimed {coinTotal} TherrCoin(s) for helping support local businesses! Thanks for being a valuable member of their community.

claimApproved.header: Approved! Business space request was reviewed and accepted
claimApproved.body1: The business location you requested ('{spaceName}') is now available on Therr app.
claimApproved.body2: If you have any questions, don't hesitate to contact support at info@therr.com.
claimApproved.postBody1: Thank you for contributing to Therr app. Users like you make this dream possible!

claimPendingReview.body1: The business location you requested ('{spaceName}') is currently being reviewed. If your claim is approved, you should receive a confirmation in the next 24-72 hours.
claimPendingReview.body2: Look for a confirmation e-mail in the next few days. If you have any questions, don't hesitate to contact support at info@therr.com.
claimPendingReview.bodyBold: Also, you may edit this campaign at any time during the review process.
claimPendingReview.postBody1: Thank you for contributing to Therr app. Users like you make this dream possible!

campaignApproved.header: Approved! Your ads campaign request was reviewed and accepted
campaignApproved.body1: Your campaign, '{campaignName}' will beginning running on the target platforms ({integrationTargets}) on the scheduled time and date.
campaignApproved.body2: Visit the dashboard for a real-time summary of campaign performance.
campaignApproved.body3: If you have any questions, don't hesitate to contact support at info@therr.com.

campaignPendingReview.body1: Your campaign ('{campaignName}') is currently being reviewed. Ads will be published to target providers after successful review.
campaignPendingReview.body2: Look for a confirmation e-mail in the next few days and/or check the dashboard for insights/metrics. If you have any questions, don't hesitate to contact support at info@therr.com.
campaignPendingReview.bodyWarning: This campaign is past the scheduled end date. Please update your campaign schedule to continue running ads.
campaignPendingReview.bodyBold: Also, you may edit this campaign at any time during the review process.
campaignPendingReview.postBody1: Thank you for using Therr for Business! We hope to simplify, streamline, and optimize ads & marketing for our customers! Reach out for feedback while we continue to improve the service offering with weekly updates.

dashboardSubscriberIntro.body1: Your business is now activated for "{productPlanName}", and your subscription will auto-renew at the end of the free trial. If you already have a dashboard account, login to manage your business space.
dashboardSubscriberIntro.body2: Otherwise, follow the link to register and get started. Claim your space and update your business details for the best results. Our marketing campaigns cater directly to your unique business needs with advance AI and automation.
dashboardSubscriberIntro.body3: If you have questions about the process or wish to update your plan, feel free to contact support at any time: {feedbackEmail}
dashboardSubscriberIntro.bodyBold: You may need to logout and log back in to see the updated account access.
dashboardSubscriberIntro.postBody1: If you are unable to click the link, copy paste the following URL in the browser: {linkUrl}

dashboardSubscriberUserNotFound.body1: The e-mail you provided when subscribing to Therr for Business was not found in our database.
dashboardSubscriberUserNotFound.body2: If you have not yet created a dashboard account, please do so now and/or let us know the e-mail you used to sign up.
dashboardSubscriberUserNotFound.body3: This will allow us to grant subscriber access to your account. We will notify you when this is complete so you can access the full features of the app.
dashboardSubscriberUserNotFound.postBody1: If you are unable to click the link, copy paste the following URL in the browser: {linkUrl}

sendEmailAndOrPush.connectionRequestSubject: [New Connection Request] {userName} sent you a request
sendEmailAndOrPush.newGroupInviteSubject: {userName} invited you to join the Group, {groupName}
